840000.name: Lust Boom
descriptionLines: A grenade launcher used em mercenaries who guarded the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Howling Mine^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Howling Mine^000000 em additional 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 em 10%.
Diminui ^009900Howling Mine^000000 e ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 skill cooldown em 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Howling Mine^000000 em additional 25%.
When ^009900Crimson Marker^000000 has been used, Aumenta o dano de ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 em additional 25% for 10 segundos.

840001.name: Patent Golden Lord Launcher
descriptionLines: A grenade launcher made of gold used by those who have reached the level of gun master who can handle all guns skillfully.
Through the strength and grip of the barrel, it began to show its natural strength.
It seems to resonate with the Great Hero's Boots.
Aumenta ranged physical o dano by 3%.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 by 15%.
Diminui ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 skill cooldown by 1 segundo.
Aumenta o dano of ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 by additional 20%.
Aumenta physical o dano against all elemental enemies by 15%.
Aumenta ranged physical o dano by 5%.

840002.name: Adulter Fides Launcher
descriptionLines: A launcher filled with false beliefs.
Increases o dano of ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 by additional 20%.
Decreases ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 skill cooldown by 2 seconds.
Increases o dano of ^009900Dragon Tail^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases ranged physical o dano by 15%.
